inputs.titre: Création de la Casa de Contratación

reason: The image depicts a plausible scene of officials working in a large hall, consistent with the administrative atmosphere of the Casa de Contratación. The clothing and architecture are generally fitting for the period, although some details could be more accurate (ruff collars are missing). The lighting seems a bit too even, possibly modern, but not disqualifying. Overall, it is a decent depiction, although it lacks the finer details expected of a true historical representation. Most men aren't wearing ruffs, which would have been more typical.
